title: Supplementary data for "Validation of a quantitative PCR assay for detection of sugar kelp (Saccharina latissima) in coastal marine sediments"
author: Tan, Samuel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Raw data for a paper in preparation: "Validation of a quantitative PCR assay for detection of sugar kelp (Saccharina latissima) in coastal marine sediments".  Contains:   Spreadsheet of curated raw data used to calculated  S. latissima  COI gene copy number per gram of dry sediment for a biomass spiking experiment to determine how gene copy number correlates with known amounts of added kelp biomass.  Spreadsheet of curated raw data from a field study looking at  S. latissima  gene copy numbers in field samples from the Damariscotta River estuary in Maine, from three sites, one under a small kelp farm, one under a site with a single kelp line, and another in a control site with no known influence of kelp farming activity.
